content.text:
[cron:agent-executive-briefing-daily executive-morning-briefing] EXECUTIVE MORNING BRIEFING: Compile overnight summary for Jeremiah. Include: 1) Revenue last 24h. 2) Agent network health. 3) Priority items requiring attention. 4) Today's calendar preview. 5) Key metrics vs targets. Format as concise Telegram message.
Current time: Thursday, March 19th, 2026 — 13:52 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-19 18:52 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
